Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

I suspect patch is touching too many files to land easily. Gerrit is already reporting 4 conflicting patches, one of which is ready to land, and unfortunately code cleanup patches will generally have lower priority for landing than bug fixes.

Consider splitting into 2-3 smaller patches.

of CFS macros.
